name: Brazil and Bulgar Wheat Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, chop finely the onion, garlic, and celery. Set nuts aside.
2. Heat oil in a pan and sauté the chopped onion, garlic, and celery until soft. Add the nuts and bulgar wheat to the pan and sauté for a couple of minutes until golden brown.
3. Stir in the vegetable stock, tomato puree, parsley, dried mixed herbs, and beaten egg. Season with salt and pepper. Let cool enough to handle.
4. Shape into burgers and either cook in an oven at 400°F/200°C/Gas 6 for 15-20 minutes until heated through or cook in a frying pan.
5. Place in burger buns with your favorite garnishes, such as cooked onion rings, lettuce, cheese, and fresh tomato.
6. If the burgers fall apart when cooking, try adding some grated cheese before shaping to help hold them together.
7. Alternatively, form tablespoon-sized amounts of mixture and fry in oil until golden brown. Place inside lightly warmed pita bread with salad and chili sauce.
